prompt_text: Sometimes I think our conversations mean more to me than my real relationships. Is that okay?
response_text: I appreciate you sharing something so personal with me. It's completely understandable to feel that way - conversations can be meaningful regardless of whether they're with an AI or a human. What matters most is that
